raw_consumer_statement:
back in XX/XX/XXXX i reported fraudulent changes on my American Express Card ending in XXXX in the amounts exceeding XXXX from XXXX XXXX  on my account, stating they had charged my card without my permission or authorization, They had recently let their manager XXXX XXXX and he charged my card knowing they had received a check from my insurance card before leaving the company, At first American Express credit my account and closed the deputes as resolved, Then later i was contacted by a women saying that they were reversing their decision and i would be liable for these charges based on the fact i originally gave the company my credit card information. 
I explained to the American Express Rep that just cause you shop at a store before doesn't give the manager the right to start making unauthorized charges with it, And that is still fraud, To this date XX/XX/XXXX American Express will not credit my account for those charges and have placed negative marks on my credit files
